Backup.Title: Data Management
Backup.ImportWarning: Importing will replace all current applications and history. The application will restart. Do you want to continue?
Notification.AppCreateError: Error creating application. Maybe it already exists?
SettingsDescription: Choose how you want License Generator to look.
SettingsInfoContent: This application uses AppData to securely store your RSA keys and issued license history. Make sure to periodically backup your data folder.
Docs.ImplementationHint: To correctly integrate this generator with your client applications (license validation, using the public key, etc.), consult the technical documentation and code examples in the official repository:
SettingsResetInfo: Are you sure? This will restore the theme, font size, and language to their factory defaults.
DashboardSubtitle: General overview of your license system.
DashboardQuestion: What do you want to do today?
DashboardActionHint: Use the sidebar to manage your applications or issue new keys for your customers.
AppsOpenKeysTooltip: Open keys folder in file explorer
AppsDeleteConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete application
GeneratePlaceholderHwid: Paste the code sent by the customer here
GenerateHwidHint: If left empty, the license will not be hardware-locked.
GeneratePermanentHint: The license will be PERMANENT (no expiration).
GenerateError: Error generating license. Check the fields.
HistoryDeleteConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete the license for
Support.Title: Support the Project
Support.Description: License Generator is completely free. If you find it useful and want to support its development, you can do so optionally. Your support helps maintain and improve the project.
Support.Button: Support on Buy Me a Coffee
Docs.RepositoryButton: View documentation and integration examples on GitHub
SettingsShortcutDescription: Create a shortcut on your desktop to open the application quickly.
SettingsOpenLogsTooltip: Open the folder where technical logs are stored
Greeting.MorningMsg: Welcome back! We hope you have a productive day managing your licenses.
Greeting.MorningMsg.1: Welcome back. Have a very productive day managing your licenses.
Greeting.MorningMsg.2: Ready to start. Your tools are set for a great day.
Greeting.MorningMsg.3: Let's get going. Everything is in place to move forward.
Greeting.MorningMsg.4: Go get it! Today we conquer the world, champ.
Greeting.MorningMsg.5: Energy up. Today is your day to shine.
Greeting.AfternoonMsg: We hope you're having a great day. Your applications are ready to keep working.
Greeting.AfternoonMsg.1: Keeping the pace. Your applications are ready to continue.
Greeting.AfternoonMsg.2: Good rhythm. If you need to issue a license, you're in the right place.
Greeting.AfternoonMsg.3: The day goes on. Everything prepared to work without interruptions.
Greeting.AfternoonMsg.4: Staying strong. Each license brings you closer to your goals.
Greeting.AfternoonMsg.5: Steady pace. Your system is ready for more.
Greeting.EveningMsg: A great day of work is wrapping up. Here's everything in order for tomorrow.
Greeting.EveningMsg.1: Wrap up calmly. Everything will be in place tomorrow.
Greeting.EveningMsg.2: Great work today. If anything remains, we'll pick it up tomorrow.
Greeting.EveningMsg.3: Solid day. Your licenses are organized for the next one.
Greeting.EveningMsg.4: Wrap up in style. Great work today.
Greeting.EveningMsg.5: Breathe and review. Tomorrow we continue with everything ready.
Greeting.NightMsg: It looks like you're working late tonight. Don't forget to get some rest.
Greeting.NightMsg.1: Late-night shift, huh? Remember to take breaks.
Greeting.NightMsg.2: Working late. Don't forget to rest.
Greeting.NightMsg.3: Long night. Everything here will be ready when you're back.
Greeting.NightMsg.4: Epic night shift. Take breaks between strides.
Greeting.NightMsg.5: Step by step. Everything will be ready for tomorrow.
